caption: A video shows a split-screen layout featuring a web page and a person. The left side of the screen displays a product page from "CASEBREAKS.COM" for a "2021 TOPPS TRANSCENDENT COLLECTION HALL OF FAME EDITION BASEBALL HOBBY CASE BREAK #1 *RANDOM HIT*" priced at "$499.99". A yellow "ADD TO CART" button is visible at the bottom. The right side of the screen alternates between a close-up of a cardboard box labeled "TRANSCENDENT" and a man with a beard wearing a black t-shirt with a yellow circular logo. The man is positioned in front of a background with a "Jaspy's Case Breaks" sign and appears to be speaking. At the bottom of the right pane, text reads "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" next to a red "Subscribe" button. The scene alternates between showing the product listing and the man and the box.
